UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Stores user profile data, settings, and usage metrics

uid.description: The unique Firebase Authentication UID of the user

displayName.description: The display name of the user

photoURL.description: URL of the user profile image

createdAt.description: Timestamp when user profile was created

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when user profile was last updated

generationCount.description: Number of ideas generated by this user

GeneratedIdea.title: GeneratedIdea
GeneratedIdea.description: An AI-generated startup idea, hackathon project, or organizer challenge set

id.description: The unique identifier of the generated idea

userId.description: The UID of the user who generated this idea

title.description: The main name/title of the project or idea

tagline.description: A short, snappy subtitle or description

inputs.description: The exact input form fields used for generation

output.description: The full JSON output returned from the Gemini API

isBookmarked.description: Whether the user has starred or bookmarked this idea

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the idea was created

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the idea was last updated

/users/{userId}.description: Individual user profiles accessible and updateable only by the owner

/ideas/{ideaId}.description: Generated ideas accessible, updateable, and deleteable only by the owner user
